details.test: Task 1: Cheapest ocean-view room under 220 for 3-night family stay
Task 2: Half-day poolside itinerary with 3 amenities via virtual tour
Task 3: Schedule 60-minute spa massage after 3pm with female therapist
Task 4: Reserve 7pm outdoor dinner at highest-rated vegetarian restaurant
Task 5: Compare two balcony+WiFi rooms under 300 and favorite larger one
Task 6: Add two highly rated kids activities on different days to itinerary
Task 7: Accessible ground-floor room with roll-in shower and shortlist
Task 8: Apply 15%+ long-stay offer to 5-night booking
Task 9: Request quote for corporate meeting for 50 people with projector and coffee break
